  <entry>
    <id>tag:github.com,2008:Repository/1158319834/v0.4.0</id>
    <updated>2026-05-30T17:42:27Z</updated>
    <link rel="alternate" type="text/html" href="https://github.com/AgentBudget/agentbudget/releases/tag/v0.4.0"/>
    <title>v0.4.0</title>
    <content type="html"><p>Consolidated release bundling today's community fixes.</p>
<h3>Added</h3>
<ul>
<li><strong>LangChain / LangGraph coverage</strong> — usage is now tracked from modern chat-model <code>usage_metadata</code> and Anthropic <code>response_metadata</code> (not just legacy <code>token_usage</code>), so chat models and LangGraph runs are counted instead of silently recording <code>$0.00</code>. Adds tool-cost tracking, a context-manager lifecycle that fires <code>on_hard_limit</code>, and callback forwarding. Thanks <a class="user-mention notranslate" data-hovercard-type="user" data-hovercard-url="/users/veeradyani222/hovercard" data-octo-click="hovercard-link-click" data-octo-dimensions="link_type:self" href="https://github.com/veeradyani222">@veeradyani222</a>! (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4233586018" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/AgentBudget/agentbudget/issues/26" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/AgentBudget/agentbudget/issues/26/hovercard" href="https://github.com/AgentBudget/agentbudget/issues/26">#26</a>)</li>
<li><strong><code>InvalidCost</code></strong> exception, exported from the package.</li>
<li><strong>Contributor docs</strong> — issue/PR templates and <code>CONTRIBUTING.md</code>. Thanks <a class="user-mention notranslate" data-hovercard-type="user" data-hovercard-url="/users/sundaram2021/hovercard" data-octo-click="hovercard-link-click" data-octo-dimensions="link_type:self" href="https://github.com/sundaram2021">@sundaram2021</a>! (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4204884368" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/AgentBudget/agentbudget/issues/25" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/AgentBudget/agentbudget/issues/25/hovercard" href="https://github.com/AgentBudget/agentbudget/issues/25">#25</a>)</li>
</ul>
<h3>Changed</h3>
<ul>
<li><strong>Drop-in API isolation</strong> — <code>init()</code>/<code>teardown()</code> session state is now scoped per thread and per async task via <code>contextvars</code>; concurrent requests no longer overwrite each other's sessions. Thanks <a class="user-mention notranslate" data-hovercard-type="user" data-hovercard-url="/users/sundaram2021/hovercard" data-octo-click="hovercard-link-click" data-octo-dimensions="link_type:self" href="https://github.com/sundaram2021">@sundaram2021</a>!
